title: LET ME REST NOW
description: Lets you sleep in beds that are too far away.
body:
![I hate you may not rest now](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nU3BTCti/images/0f7e7bf7f8db7666d8190ade325d9f986192b6a1.gif)

WE ALL HATE THIS MESSAGE TAKE CONTROL OF YOUR LIFE AND SLEEP IN BEDS THAT ARE TOO FAR AWAY

JUST LET ME REEEEESSSTTTTTTT
